roiRanking.conversionImpact: No images = 40-60% lower conversion rate — customers and AI agents skip imageless products.
No SKU = inventory matching fails — fulfilment AI cannot track this variant.
No SEO title = raw product title used in search snippets — often poorly formatted.
Tag-description mismatch signals inconsistent metadata — reduces AI confidence.
No meta description = AI generates its own snippet — usually lower quality.
Without specs, product cannot rank in 'best X under Y' queries — high commercial-intent traffic missed.
No use-case = cannot match intent queries like 'office shoes' or 'gym bag'.
Thin descriptions lose to competitors with rich content — est. 25% lower conversion.
Contradictory context = AI filters product from both seasonal query sets.
Missing material = excluded from material-based filters like 'cotton shirts' — 20-40% of apparel queries.

narrative: This store scores 78.7/100 (Grade B) on AI representation quality across 30 products. AI agents are missing approximately 28% of potential search traffic due to weak metadata signals (retrieval score: 72.5/100 — MEDIUM). The single highest-ROI fix is 'SKU_MISSING' — affects 30/30 products and is the most common reason AI agents skip this store's catalogue. Fixing the top 3 issues store-wide would significantly improve AI discoverability without requiring any new products or design changes.

issues.message: No return/refund policy found. AI shopping agents flag stores without return policies as high-risk — customers are actively warned away.
No shipping policy found. AI agents answering 'when will my order arrive?' cannot answer for this store — reducing recommendation likelihood.
No FAQ page found. AI agents use FAQ content to answer pre-purchase questions. Without it, the store loses 'answer box' placement in AI search results.
Store has 12 different vendor names. AI agents prefer stores with consistent brand identity.
